# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

$templatesDir = __DIR__ . '/templates';
$defaultPage = 'home';

$page = $_GET['page'] ?? $defaultPage;
$page = strtolower(trim($page));
$page = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_-]/', '', $page);

if ($page === '') {
    $page = $defaultPage;
}

$file = realpath($templatesDir . '/' . $page . '.php');
$base = realpath($templatesDir);

if ($file && $base && str_starts_with($file, $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) && is_file($file)) {
    include $file;
} else {
    http_response_code(404);
    $notFound = realpath($templatesDir . '/404.php');

    if ($notFound && str_starts_with($notFound, $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) && is_file($notFound)) {
        include $notFound;
    } else {
        echo '404 - Page not found';
    }
}
